site.title: TS Aromatics | A Legacy of Purity
site.description: Premium essential oils and botanical ingredients for manufacturers, wellness founders, and formulators.

hero.title: Pure Aromatics. Ethical Sourcing. Built for Brands.
hero.subtitle: TS Aromatics supplies premium essential oils and botanical ingredients for manufacturers, wellness founders, and formulators who need purity, documentation, and human support.

pillars.1_desc: GC/MS documentation available on request, with clear batch references for serious procurement teams.
pillars.2_desc: From COA interpretation to formulation guidance — we support your R&D team like an extended lab partner.
pillars.3_desc: Sample-to-bulk onboarding, private labelling, and custom blending for growing brands.

teaser.title: High-demand oils for modern formulations.
teaser.subtitle: A focused preview of the catalog. The full product experience lives on the dedicated products page.

why_us.title: Why TS Aromatics
why_us.subtitle: We treat essential oils as analytical chemistry — every batch documented, every claim verifiable.
why_us.cert_subtitle: Every batch ships with full regulatory documentation.
why_us.sourcing_desc: We source directly from 12 partner distilleries across India, Egypt, and France — supporting ethical farming and fair-trade cooperatives. Full traceability from field to finished batch.
why_us.rd_desc: Custom chemotype sourcing, private-label blending, and formulation support. If you need a specific GC/MS profile, we can source it.
why_us.compliance_items: COA | GC/MS | MSDS | IFRA Certificate | Allergen Statement | Organic Cert | Non-GMO | Kosher
why_us.support_desc: Your account comes with a dedicated technical concierge. From COA interpretation to formulation guidance — we extend your R&D team.
why_us.response_time: Response time: < 4 hours · 6 days a week
why_us.testimonial_1: We switched to TS Aromatics for our lavender supply — the GC/MS documentation alone saved us weeks of QA validation.
why_us.testimonial_2: Their technical team helped us reformulate three products with better chemotype matches. Real expertise, not just sales.
why_us.testimonial_3: Consistent quality, transparent batch data, and reliable lead times. Exactly what we need for our production line.

academy.a2_desc: A beginner-friendly guide to grades, dilution, storage, and quality checks.
academy.a3_title: From Lab to Product: Our Quality Process
academy.a3_desc: How sourcing, testing, packaging, and documentation work together.

doc_library.doc_coa_lavender_desc: Certificate of Analysis with batch-specific GC/MS data and physicochemical properties.
doc_library.doc_sds_lemon_desc: Safety Data Sheet for cold-pressed Citrus limon peel oil.

butter.title: Melt Perfection
butter.desc: Shea, cocoa, mango and jojoba — our butters are cold-processed to preserve bioactive compounds.
butter.shea: Ultra-refined, ivory grade. High stearic/oleic profile for premium skincare emulsions.
butter.cocoa: Natural deodorised. Rich chocolate aroma for lip balms and solid lotions.
butter.mango: Soft, spreadable consistency. High unsaponifiable content for luxury body butters.
